title: Risk heat map
desc: The risk heat map visualizes likelihood vs. impact where likelihood is the probability of an event occurring and impact is the magnitude of the consequence.

title: Stephen Boyd Davis ID(E)RU x DDR timeline
desc: Timeline of the transition from ID(E)RU to DDR, 1962–1986.

title: DDR archive taxonomy
desc: Critical taxonomy with core intended and critical authorities.

title: Ingestion Sequence Diagram
desc: Sequence diagram of metadata ingestion: form validation, secure media upload, and confirmation from backend services.

title: Context engineering over multimodal RAG
desc: Carbon-styled flow: strategy → components → assembly → analyzer → fusion → generation.

title: PostgreSQL schema
desc: pgModeler schema of ddr_archive: top-left ingestion tables (alembic_version, items); middle band staff layer (agent_employment, core_agent, iso_639_language_codes); bottom ref_* authority grid (incl. ddr_category); top-right green block of yellow analytics views—our human-readable database map of live system.

title: WD+RU: Women in Design Research
desc: For International Women's Day 2026, WD+RU and Graham Newman spotlight women of the RCA Department of Design Research (1965-85), notable for its female representation. WD+RU continues raising awareness of women in visual communication and design education, where inequities persist.

title: PhD conceptual framework
desc: A three-strand conceptual framework for activating the RCA’s DDR archive through testamentary traces of contested design knowledge, linking historical inquiry, archival systems, and computational methods including multimodal machine learning and visual analytics.

title: Prototypical argument structure
desc: Aristotle and other Greek rhetoricians laid down a basic structure for an argument that still serves as a useful template. Derived from Mike Sharples, Writing as Creative Design (London: Routledge, 1999).

title: Testamentary traces ingested into machine learning
desc: Archival testamentary traces move through preparation, embedding, and model training to become retrieval-ready ML artifacts for analysis and reuse.

title: Y1 APR literature review mapping
desc: Miro export showing Year 1 APR literature review mapping, converted from PDF to SVG for the gallery.

title: Plan to completion
desc: Blueprint and roadmap for the PhD, outlining the path from current research synthesis through writing, validation, and submission milestones.
